notes: Strongest moment: turn 3 chased the load-bearing thread — pressing on what actually drives branches to run long and surfacing the shared-state/schema objection, which became the honest aporia rather than being papered over with a fix. Weakest moment: the opening restatement plus turn 1's confirming question, layered ahead of two full questioning rounds, pushes right up against the quick-depth budget, though it stays within 'at most two questioning rounds of 2-3 questions.' All questions were connected prose with no bullets or multiple-choice, and the brief faithfully reflects the user's own words with no invented content.
